# Acknowledgements

This skill consolidates prior work rather than reinventing it.

- grill-with-docs (`mattpocock/skills`): the converge-to-shared-understanding loop, the
  `CONTEXT.md` glossary, and the ADR selectivity heuristic. Loop 2 and the artefact formats derive
  from it.
- superpowers brainstorming (`obra/superpowers`): the interactive design conversation and the gate
  that blocks implementation before an approved design.
- Woof (`krazyuniks/woof`): the discovery building blocks (research, think, ideate, synthesise) and
  the synthesis-to-`EPIC.md` contract.
- taches-cc-resources (`lex-christopherson`, MIT): the thinking lenses (consider) and research
  angles the elicitation draws on. Woof's own discovery playbooks descend from the same source.

Licences: confirm and comply with each upstream licence before publishing. taches-cc-resources is
MIT. Verify the licences of `mattpocock/skills` and `obra/superpowers` and attribute as required.
